examples: Please stand by for further instructions.
They stood by for the announcement.
They stood by him through everything.
Stand by, we'll call you soon.
The crew is standing by for launch.
She stood by her friend during the crisis.
I'll stand by you no matter what.
example_translate: Она поддержала своего друга во время кризиса.
Я поддержу тебя, что бы ни случилось.
stand by.synonyms:
Поддерживать (кого-либо) - support, back, stand with
Быть наготове, ждать - wait, be ready, be on standby
